plan_metadata.name: group  validation basic ai chat bot fake key py

steps.description: Click the 'Type a message' input field in the Microsoft Teams app window at coordinates (278, 721).

parameters.text: How to develop agent for Teams?

steps.description: Type the text 'How to develop agent for Teams?' into the input field located at the bottom of the chat interface within the Teams application, under the section titled 'vscuse_app_QTSvnlocal'.
Press the "Enter" key to submit the message typed in the input field at the bottom of the Microsoft Teams interface in the  conversation.
Click the "Close" button (X) at the top-right corner of the Google Chrome window to exit the Microsoft Teams web app.
Click the left mouse button on the "Terminal" tab at the bottom of the Visual Studio Code interface to activate the terminal panel.
Press Ctrl+F in Visual Studio Code to open the Find search box within the active Terminal panel.

parameters.text: invalid subscription key or wrong API endpoint

steps.description: Type the text 'invalid subscription key or wrong API endpoint' into the search bar of the Terminal panel in Visual Studio Code.
@assertion there's "invalid subscription key or wrong API endpoint" in find result.
